message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false

class HomeViewController << (C,#9ACD32) >> {
  emailTextField : UITextField!
  passwordTextField : UITextField!
  displayNameTextField : UITextField!
  --
  onSubmitButtonTapped(_:)
  attemptRegister()
  attemptLogin()
}

class "HomeViewController" as HomeViewControllerExt <<extension>> << (X,#DDA0DD) >> {
  displayError(_:)
  displayMessage(_:)
  loginDidSucceed()
  registerDidSucceed()
}

interface DTAuthDelegate <<protocol>> << (P,#DAA520) >> {
  displayError(_:)
  displayMessage(_:)
  loginDidSucceed()
  registerDidSucceed()
}

class FirebaseAuthProvider << (C,#9ACD32) >> {
  fbUser : User?
  user : DTUser?
  --
  init()
  signUp(email:password:displayName:)
  login(email:password:)
  setUserDisplayName(_:)
}

class DTAuth << (C,#9ACD32) >> {
  user : DTUser?
  --
  signUp(email:password:displayName:)
  login(email:password:)
}

interface DTAbstractAuthProvider <<protocol>> << (P,#DAA520) >> {
  user : DTUser?
  --
  signUp(email:password:displayName:)
  login(email:password:)
}

class DTUser <<struct>> << (S,#87CEEB) >> {
  uid : String
  displayName : String
  email : String
}

class UserExt <<extension>> << (X,#DDA0DD) >> {
  toDTUser()
}

HomeViewController --> DTAuth : sends auth events to

HomeViewControllerExt ..|> DTAuthDelegate

FirebaseAuthProvider *-- DTAuthDelegate : sends events
FirebaseAuthProvider --> UserExt
FirebaseAuthProvider ..> DTAbstractAuthProvider : converts to DTUser using

DTAuth *-- DTAbstractAuthProvider : 1
DTAuth *-- DTUser : 1
@enduml
